ab: Pasifana’en no singsi kita anini to samaan han a misano’Amis ko 動物.
ch: 今天老師要教大家動物的阿美語怎麼說。
en: will teach everyone all kinds of animals in Pangcah language today.

ab: Pasifana’en no singsi kita anini to samaan han a misano’Amis ko 植物.
ch: 今天老師要教大家植物的阿美語怎麼說。
en: I will teach everyone all kinds of plants in Pangcah language today.

ab: Pasifana’en no singsi kita anini to samaan han a misano’Amis ko 水果
ch: 今天老師要教大家水果的阿美語怎麼說。
en: I will teach everyone all kinds of fruits in Pangcah language today.

ab: Aka kafoti’.
Aka kacaciyaw.
Aka kakomaen.
Alaen a pasadak ko tanengnengan no miso.
Alaen a pasadak ko impic no miso.
Alaen a pasadak ko tatiliden no miso.
Solimeten to ko tanengnengan.
Solimeten to ko impic.
Solimeten to ko kakaenen.
Solimeten to ko tasalamaan.
O no nima a impic koni?
O no mako.
O no nima a tanengnengan koni?
O ni Kacaw.
O no nima a sasipasip koni?
Cowa kafana’ kako.
O riko’ ni Kacaw kora han?
Cowa, o riko’ ni Panay koni.
Singsi, cowa kapihawikid kako to tanengnengan.
en: Teacher, I didn’t bring my textbook.

ab: Hacafay han ko kapot a minengneng.
en: Share the book with your classmate next to you.

ab: Maketonay to ko impic no mako.
Tanoimpicen a mitilid.
Mahidayay to ko sasipasip no mako.
Pacaliwen kiso to sasipasip no mako.
en: I will lend you my eraser.

ab: Pahanhan to kita, na’onen to ko rakat a minokay!
ch: A:我們要下課了，回家路上要小心!
en: It is the end of the class, be careful on your way home.

ab: Hai, aray singsi.
Pahanhan to kita, sanga’ayen to ko no mita.
ch: A:我們要下課了，大家再見。
en: The class is over, goodbye everyone.

ab: Sanga’ayen to ko no miso singsi.
